user.title: Veolia configuration
user.description: To test the compatibility of your Veolia account with this integration, please enter your postal code:

data_description.postal_code: The postal code of the address supplied by Veolia.

data.commune: Please select your commune from the list below :

data_description.commune: The commune determines which Veolia portal serves your account.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Good news, your Veolia account works with this integration. Please enter your Veolia login credentials:

data_description.username: The email address of your Veolia account.
data_description.password: The password of your Veolia account.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Veolia
reconfigure.description: Update the credentials of your Veolia account:

data_description.username: The email address of your Veolia account.
data_description.password: The password of your Veolia account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Please enter the new password:

data_description.password: The new password of your Veolia account.

error.unknown: Unable to connect, check the logs for more information
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Veolia commune lookup service
error.commune_not_supported: Sorry, your Veolia account is not supported. You must wait for the migration to the new site.
error.no_communes_found: No communes found for this postal code
error.commune_not_veolia: Veolia does not provide water in this commune

abort.unique_id_mismatch: These credentials belong to a different Veolia account

data_description.scan_interval: How often the integration fetches data from the Veolia portal.

auth_failed.message: Authentication with the Veolia portal failed; please update your credentials.

set_alert_failed.message: The Veolia portal rejected the alert settings update.

alert_settings_unavailable.message: Alert settings are not available yet; try again after the next update.

unknown_portal.message: The configured portal {portal} is not supported by the installed client package.

unknown_portal.title: Unsupported water portal
unknown_portal.description: The portal “{portal}” configured for this entry is not supported by the installed veolia-api-foxace package anymore. Update the integration or reconfigure the entry.

api_down.title: Veolia data unavailable
api_down.description: Fetching data has failed repeatedly for about two days. The Veolia portal may be down; data will resume automatically once it recovers.
